title: "When do alterations to templates automatically reflect in boards generated from that template?"
excerpt: “I find it extremely frustrating that updates to my template don’t automatically apply to boards created from it. When can we expect this to change? I currently have over 80 projects built off this template, and having t…

posts.author: zain (Zain Zain)
posts.cookedHtml: “I find it extremely frustrating that updates to my template don’t automatically apply to boards created from it. When can we expect this to change? I currently have over 80 projects built off this template, and having to manually update each one when changes occur is quite cumbersome. This situation seems far from ideal.”

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Zain! We are so sorry to hear of your frustration with the template feature. Our templates do not auto-update in order to prevent accidental changes being made to multiple boards, however, we can absolutely see how saving many iterations of a template as new templates would be cumbersome and annoying.

We would love for you to share your feedback here so other community members can upvote it and our product team can take a closer look into developing this!
